title: Creamy Salty Croatian Toor Dal
description: A comforting one‑pot dish of split yellow lentils simmered with a subtle tandoori spice blend, finished with low‑fat yogurt for a creamy finish and a satisfying salty kick, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Rinse the toor dal under running water until clear.
In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent (~3 min).
Add minced garlic and stir for 30 seconds.
Stir in tandoori spice mix and sauté for 1 min to release the flavors.
Add rinsed dal and water. Stir, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the dal is tender and starts to break apart.
Remove from heat, stir in low‑fat Greek yogurt and lemon juice until creamy. Taste and adjust salt if needed.
Garnish with chopped coriander and serve hot.
